The '''power gem attack ship''' was a small two-seat craft used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==Description==
A [[power gem]], a powerful stone believed capable of disrupting a [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] defensive shields, was affixed to the front of the vessel.

==History==
The Rebels attempted to use the power gem to take down to shields of the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] as it headed for the Rebels' base, hoping to at least delay its arrival to allow for the base's evacuation. Initially, the craft launched with [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Vrad Dodonna]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] aboard, but Dodonna landed and forced Skywalker out of the ship and attacked on his own. The power gem proved useless against the ''Executor'' and Dodonna was killed, but the attack did help delay the immense warship.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This vessel was not given an official name, but was referred to as an "attack ship".

==Appearances==
*"[[Doom Mission]]" {{Reprint|Doom Mission}}
